name_cn:
# 🔥Marmont Original Leather#
▫️Model: 443497
▫️Size: 26*15*7cm
💚New, elegant light olive green! A very popular classic in the collection. The leather has been upgraded. The classic double-G design, the best-selling model. The simple flap design adds two letters 'G' to instantly elevate the look. The 3D embroidery brings the whole bag to life under the light, simply irresistible.
